title: Coinbase execs deny lobbying against Bitcoin de minimis tax exemption
message_html: Coinbase execs deny lobbying against Bitcoin de minimis tax exemption ...
snippet: US lawmakers are eyeing tax exemptions for US dollar stablecoins, which are pegged and do not change in value, but not other cryptocurrencies.
